hand.name: Scout
hand.ability: When bought, look at the top Insider Tip card.

hand.name: Wild Speculation
hand.description: Reveal the top main-deck card and put it on the bottom; if it is a colored stock, raise or lower that color by 3 (your choice). If it has no color, reveal again

persistentEffects.name: Preferred Bidder
persistentEffects.description: For rest of game, when you tie the winning bid, you win

hand.name: Informant
hand.ability: When sold, look at the top Insider Tip card.

hand.name: Scout
hand.ability: When bought, look at the top Insider Tip card.

hand.name: Tip-Off
hand.ability: When bought, raise a different color of your choice by +1.

hand.name: Wild Share
hand.ability: No cash value and cannot be sold. When claiming a Goal, may count as one stock of any one color, then is discarded.

market.name: Scout
market.ability: When bought, look at the top Insider Tip card.

market.name: Informant
market.ability: When sold, look at the top Insider Tip card.

market.name: Tip-Off
market.ability: When bought, raise a different color of your choice by +1.

market.name: Tip-Off
market.ability: When bought, raise a different color of your choice by +1.

market.name: Wild Share
market.ability: No cash value and cannot be sold. When claiming a Goal, may count as one stock of any one color, then is discarded.

mainDeck.name: Wild Share
mainDeck.ability: No cash value and cannot be sold. When claiming a Goal, may count as one stock of any one color, then is discarded.

mainDeck.name: Corner the Market
mainDeck.description: Take any one face-up market stock for free (not bought: no price move, no ability)

mainDeck.name: The Squeeze
mainDeck.description: Raise one stock by +2 OR lower one stock by -2

mainDeck.name: Boom
mainDeck.ability: When bought, Orange rises an extra +1 (Orange rises +2 total).

mainDeck.name: Boom
mainDeck.ability: When bought, Yellow rises an extra +1 (Yellow rises +2 total).

mainDeck.name: Tip-Off
mainDeck.ability: When bought, raise a different color of your choice by +1.

mainDeck.name: Tipster's Choice
mainDeck.description: Draw 2 cards from the main deck, keep 1, return the other to the bottom

mainDeck.name: Rumor Mill
mainDeck.description: Adjust every stock by +1 or -1 (choose per stock)

mainDeck.name: Informant
mainDeck.ability: When sold, look at the top Insider Tip card.

mainDeck.name: Inside Track
mainDeck.description: Look at the top 2 Insider Tip cards and return them in any order

mainDeck.name: Hostile Takeover
mainDeck.description: Look at another player's hand and take 1 stock of your choice. They receive $6 from the bank

mainDeck.name: Boom
mainDeck.ability: When bought, Purple rises an extra +1 (Purple rises +2 total).

discardPile.name: Stock Certificate Forgery
discardPile.description: Claim any one goal using one fewer stock than required

discardPile.name: Boom
discardPile.ability: When bought, Blue rises an extra +1 (Blue rises +2 total).

discardPile.name: Wild Share
discardPile.ability: No cash value and cannot be sold. When claiming a Goal, may count as one stock of any one color, then is discarded.

discardPile.name: Wiretap
discardPile.description: Look at the top 2 Insider Tip cards and return them in any order

discardPile.name: Informant
discardPile.ability: When sold, look at the top Insider Tip card.

discardPile.name: Pump and Dump
discardPile.description: Sell 1 stock at double its current price (still a sale: that color falls -1)

discardPile.name: Scout
discardPile.ability: When bought, look at the top Insider Tip card.

resolvedInsiderTips.text: Blue stock value is halved (round down)
Blue stock value is halved (round down)

reward.text: Draw 3 cards from the main deck, keep 1, return the others to the bottom
Sell any number of stocks, gain +$4 per stock sold

log: Game initialized with 3 players: 42 cards in main deck, 5 in market, 6 Insider Tips, 5 goals.

T1 Astor: auctioned stock-5 Blue Boom at initial $3. Bidding: Getty $6, Morgan $7, Astor passed, Getty passed -> Morgan won at $7 (cash 30->23). Blue +2 to 6. Morgan holds 1 Blue. Market refilled with stock-31 Purple Scout.
T1 Astor die roll: 1 -> flipped itip-58 (Yellow +4). Tips left: 5

T2 Getty: auctioned stock-30 Purple Tip-Off at initial $3. Bidding: Morgan $4, Astor passed, Getty passed -> Morgan won at $4 (cash 23->19). Purple +1 to 5 (buy); Tip-Off raised Blue +1 to 7. Morgan holds 1 Blue + 1 Purple. Market refilled with stock-20 Yellow blank.
T2 Getty die roll: 2 -> nothing.

T3 Morgan: auctioned stock-1 Blue blank at initial $5. Bidding: Astor $6, Getty $7, Morgan $8, Astor passed, Getty passed -> Morgan won at $8 (cash 19->11). Blue +1 to 8. Morgan holds 2 Blue + 1 Purple. Market refilled with action-42 Preferred Bidder.
T3 free action: Morgan claimed goal-64 (2 Blue), reward Gain $5 (cash 11->16). 4 goals remain.
T3 Morgan die roll: 6 -> all stocks +1.

T4 Astor: auctioned stock-9 Orange blank at initial $3. Bidding: Getty $4, Morgan passed, Astor $5, Getty passed -> Astor won at $5 (cash 30->25). Orange +1 to 6. Astor holds 1 Orange. Market refilled with action-43 Stock Certificate Forgery.
T4 Astor die roll: 5 -> nothing.

T5 Getty: auctioned stock-20 Yellow blank at initial $5. Bidding: Morgan passed, Astor $6, Getty $7, Astor $8, Getty $9, Astor passed -> Getty won at $9 (cash 30->21). Yellow +1 to 10. Getty holds 1 Yellow. Market refilled with stock-24 Yellow Informant.
T5 Getty die roll: 1 -> flipped itip-62 (All stocks -2). Tips left: 4

T6 Morgan: auctioned action-43 Stock Certificate Forgery at initial $0. Bidding: Astor $5, Getty passed, Morgan $6, Astor passed -> Morgan won at $6 (cash 16->10). Market refilled with stock-34 Wild Share.

T6 free action: Morgan played Stock Certificate Forgery to claim goal-68 (3 Blue, claimed with 2 Blue). Reward: stole $4 from Astor and $4 from Getty (+$8, cash ->18). Astor and Getty each -$4. 3 goals remain.
T6 Morgan die roll: 5 -> nothing.

T7 Astor: auctioned stock-31 Purple Scout at initial $0. Bidding: Getty $2, Morgan $3, Astor $4, Getty passed, Morgan passed -> Astor won at $4 (cash 21->17). Purple +1 to 5. Scout peek: Astor saw top tip = itip-61 (Yellow +3 / Purple +3). Astor holds 1 Orange + 1 Purple. Market refilled with stock-18 Yellow blank.
T7 Astor die roll: 3 -> nothing.

T8 Getty: auctioned stock-18 Yellow blank at initial $6. Bidding: Morgan $7, Astor passed, Getty $8, Morgan passed -> Getty won at $8 (cash 17->9). Yellow +1 to 9. Getty holds 2 Yellow. Market refilled with stock-16 Orange Informant.
T8 Getty die roll: 4 -> nothing.
T9 Morgan: SOLD stock-5 Blue Boom for $7 (cash 18->25), Blue -1 to 6. Morgan holds 1 Blue + 1 Purple.
T9 Morgan die roll: 2 -> nothing.
T10 Astor: auctioned stock-34 Wild Share at initial $0. Bidding: Getty $10, Morgan passed, Astor passed -> Getty won at $10 (cash 9->9 after 1 loan). Market refilled with stock-2 Blue blank.

T10 free action: Getty claimed goal-70 (3 Yellow) using 2 Yellow + Wild Share (Wild discarded). Reward: Gain $10 (cash 9->19). 2 goals remain (goal-69, goal-76) -- the NEXT goal claimed ends the game.
T10 Getty die roll: 6 -> all stocks +1.

T11 Morgan: auctioned stock-24 Yellow Informant at initial $5. Bidding: Astor $6, Getty $7, Morgan passed, Astor passed -> Getty won at $7 (cash 19->12). Yellow +1 to 11. Getty holds 3 Yellow. Market refilled with action-47 Wiretap.
T11 Morgan die roll: 6 -> all stocks +1.

T12 Astor: auctioned stock-16 Orange Informant at initial $0. Bidding: Getty $2, Morgan $4, Astor passed, Getty passed -> Morgan won at $4 (cash 25->21). Orange +1 to 7 (buy; Informant peek triggers on sell only). Morgan holds 1 Blue + 1 Purple + 1 Orange. Market refilled with stock-11 Orange blank.
T12 Astor die roll: 3 -> nothing

T13 Getty: auctioned stock-3 Blue blank at initial $0. Bidding: Morgan passed, Astor passed -> Getty won at $0 (cash 12). Blue +1 to 9. Getty holds 3 Yellow + 1 Blue. Market refilled with stock-23 Scout.
T13 Getty die roll: 1 -> flipped itip-61 (Yellow +3 / Purple +3). Tips left: 3

T14 Morgan: auctioned action-47 Wiretap at initial $1. Bidding: Astor passed, Getty passed -> Morgan won at $1 (cash 21->20). Wiretap added to Morgan hand (action card, no price move). Market refilled with stock-15 Scout.
T14 Morgan die roll: 1 -> flipped itip-48 (Blue stock value is halved (round down)). Tips left: 2

T15 Astor: auctioned stock-15 Orange Scout at initial $2. Bidding: Getty passed, Morgan passed -> Astor won at $2 (cash 17->15). Orange +1 to 8. Scout peek: Astor saw top Insider Tip = itip-49 (Blue stock value is halved (round down)). Astor holds 2 Orange + 1 Purple. Market refilled with stock-36 Wild Share.
T15 Astor die roll: 4 -> nothing

T16 Getty: auctioned stock-36 Wild Share at initial $4. Bidding: Morgan $7, Astor passed, Getty passed -> Morgan won at $7 (cash 20->13). Wild Share added to Morgan hand (no price move). Market refilled with action-41 Wild Speculation.
T16 Getty die roll: 5 -> nothing

T17 Morgan: auctioned stock-23 Yellow Scout at initial $0. Bidding: Astor passed, Getty $8, Morgan passed -> Getty won at $8 (cash 12->4). Yellow +1 to 16. Scout peek: Getty saw top Insider Tip = itip-49 (Blue stock value is halved (round down)). Getty holds 4 Yellow + 1 Blue. Market refilled with action-39 Pump and Dump.
T17 Morgan die roll: 5 -> nothing

T18 Astor: auctioned stock-11 Orange blank at initial $1. Bidding: Getty $4, Morgan passed, Astor passed -> Getty won at $4 (cash 4->0). Orange +1 to 9. Getty holds 4 Yellow + 1 Blue + 1 Orange (denied Astor his 3rd Orange). Market refilled with stock-7 Scout.
T18 Astor die roll: 5 -> nothing

T19 Getty: auctioned stock-2 Blue blank at initial $0. Bidding: Morgan passed, Astor passed -> Getty won at $0 (cash 0). Blue +1 to 5. Getty holds 4 Yellow + 2 Blue + 1 Orange. Market refilled with stock-8 Informant.
T19 Getty die roll: 6 -> all stocks +1

T20 Morgan: auctioned action-39 Pump and Dump at initial $0. Bidding: Astor passed, Getty passed -> Morgan won at $0 (cash 13). Action card added to Morgan hand (no price move). Market refilled with stock-6.
T20 Morgan die roll: 3 -> nothing.
T21 free action: Astor used Hot Tip, peeked top Insider Tip = itip-49 (Blue stock value is halved (round down)).
T21 free action: Getty used Hot Tip, peeked top Insider Tip = itip-49 (Blue stock value is halved (round down)).
T21 free action: Morgan played Wiretap, viewed top 2 Insider Tips and reordered to [itip-56 Blue +4, itip-49 Blue halved] (surge now on top). Wiretap discarded.

T21 Astor: auctioned action-42 Preferred Bidder at initial $2. Bidding: Getty $3, Morgan passed, Astor $4, Getty passed -> Astor won at $4 (cash 15->11). Preferred Bidder added to Astor hand. Market refilled with stock-22.
T21 Astor die roll: 2 -> nothing.

T22 free action: Morgan played Pump and Dump on stock-16 Orange Informant -> sold at double ($20), cash 13->33. Orange 10->9. Informant peek: top tip = itip-56 (Blue +4). stock-16 and action-39 discarded.
T22 free action: Astor played Preferred Bidder (action-42) -> persistent tiebreaker now active for Astor.
T22 Getty: SOLD stock-3 Blue blank for $6 (cash 0->6). Blue 6->5. Getty holds 4 Yellow + 1 Blue + 1 Orange.
T22 Getty die roll: 5 -> nothing.

T23 Morgan: auctioned action-41 Wild Speculation at initial $0. Bidding: Astor $0 (Preferred Bidder tie -> lead), Getty passed, Morgan passed -> Astor won at $0. Wild Speculation added to Astor hand. Market refilled with stock-35.
T23 Morgan die roll: 1 -> flipped itip-56 (Blue +4). Tips left: 1.
T24 Astor: SOLD stock-31 Purple Scout for $11 (cash 11->22). Purple 11->10. Astor holds 2 Orange.
T24 Astor die roll: 5 -> nothing.
T25 Getty: SOLD stock-11 Orange blank for $9 (cash 6->15). Orange 9->8. Getty holds 4 Yellow + 1 Blue.
T25 Getty die roll: 1 -> flipped itip-49 (Blue stock value is halved (round down)). Tips left: 0.
GAME END: Insider Tip deck emptied on T25 (last tip itip-49 resolved by Getty’s die roll of 1).
GAME OVER. Final prices Blue $4, Orange $8, Yellow $17, Purple $10.
Final #1: Getty $75 (cash $15 + stocks $72 - loans $12)
Final #2: Morgan $47 (cash $33 + stocks $14 - loans $0)
Final #3: Astor $38 (cash $22 + stocks $16 - loans $0)
WINNER: Getty with $75.
